# side-conversation

Right side pane that displays a second conversation alongside the host
conversation. URL shape: `/c/<host>/c/<side>` — the host conversation
keeps the left split (rendered by `conversation-view`), this pane fills
the right split via the existing pane Outlet.

v1 is read-only: the pane shows the side conversation's JSONL transcript
plus standard PaneChrome (title, expand to `/c/<sideConvId>`, close).
The chip in `active-data/conv` opens this pane.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Right side pane that shows a second conversation alongside the host (read-only viewer; expand to pop out).
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `convSidePane`
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` `conv-side` (path `c/:sideConvId`)
